variants.name: baseline
variants.description: Direct deterministic mapping from thesis signals, constraints, and hypotheses.
entry_long: Require trend/confirmation alignment on bar close.
Require thesis regime match before long entry.
entry_short: Require inverse trend/confirmation alignment on bar close.
Reject short if thesis regime does not support reversal.
exit_rules: Exit on signal invalidation.
Exit on opposite alignment signal.
Exit on max bars in trade threshold.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Range-bound chop erodes edge
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Signal lag after volatility shock
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Indicator disagreement at entry
